langflow-ai/langflow#11548.body: ### Bug Description I am encountering a persistent and inconsistent error with the **File Component** when uploading Markdown (`.md`) files. The issue is specifically regarding the error: > `ValueError: called add_log but no component context found` **The Behavior:** - I have multiple `.md` files in the **same local directory**. - Some files upload and process correctly without any issues. - Other files (from the same directory, same extension) fail immediately with the error above. - Retrying the failed files multiple times, deleting the component, or refreshing the page does not solve the issue for those specific files. This suggests the error is not related to directory permissions (since some files work) but might be related to a race condition in the backend logging mechanism or how specific file content is being handled. ### Environment - **OS:** Windows 11 - **Browser:** Edge - **Langflow Version:** 1.7.2 ### Reproduction 1. Drag a `File` component into the canvas. 2. Select a `.md` file from the local disk. 3. (Scenario A) The file loads correctly. 4. (Scenario B) I select a different `.md` file from the *same* folder. 5. The UI shows an error or the build fails with: `called add_log but no component context found`. ### Expected behavior ### Actual Behavior The component fails to load/process specific files and throws a context error, blocking the flow. ### Expected Behavior All valid `.md` files should be uploaded and processed consistently, regardless of the specific file selection. ### Who can help? _No response_ ### Operating System Windows 11 ### Langflow Version Version: 1.7.2 ### Python Version 3.12 ### Screenshot ### Flow File _No response_
langflow-ai/langflow#11548.title: File Component throws "no component context" error for specific .md files
